message:
Fix missing tenzir-changelog in release notification

The workflow used `uvx tenzir-changelog` but uv was not installed.
Install tenzir-changelog via pip alongside other notification
dependencies instead.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,7 +147,7 @@ jobs:
             version=$(basename "$release_dir")
             echo "Notifying Discord about new release: ${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }} $version"
             # Generate notes with explicit links for Discord
-            uvx tenzir-changelog --root "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog" \
+            tenzir-changelog --root "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog" \
               release notes --explicit-links "$version" > /tmp/notes.md
             python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py release "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" "$version" /tmp/notes.md "$DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK" || true
             sleep 1  # Rate limiting
